payload.last_assistant_message:
There are no staged or modified tracked files — only untracked agentic harness artifacts (`.claude`, `.logs/`, `.ports.env`, `adws`), which shouldn't be committed as part of this feature.

There are no app-layer changes to commit. The branch `feat-13-remove-ctas-photoshop-plans-page` appears to have no code changes yet for removing CTAs from the Photoshop Plans page.

If you've made changes to the plans page, make sure to stage them first with `git add <files>`, then run `/commit` again.
